name: AMATUHI HOLDINGS, INC.
business: The company operates group homes in Japan for individuals with physical and mental disabilities, funded primarily through government self-support benefits under the Comprehensive Support Act for Persons with Disabilities. It relies on continuous payments from the Japanese government and plans to expand its number of group homes.

exposures.sentence: For our operation of group homes, we are dependent on continuous payments for self-support benefits from the Japanese government based on the Comprehensive Support Act for Persons with Disabilities.

catalysts.sentence: It is management’s goal to open and operate 48 group homes by the end of the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026.
